title: Hello World — Starting My Build in Public Journey
excerpt: Why I'm building in public and what I hope to achieve. Sharing the process, the failures, and the little wins along the way.

title: Little Wins — The iPhone App
excerpt: The backstory, tech stack, UI decisions, and why there's no login. Building the ADHD-friendly win tracker I've wanted for years.

title: Submitting Little Wins to the App Store — Current Status
excerpt: What's done, what's left, and why I keep procrastinating on screenshots and certificates. Shipping by end of week.

title: I Tried Android First — 12 Users, 15 Days, Blocked
excerpt: Android testing with real users was paralyzing for an introvert with ADHD. The iPhone App Store path doesn't need any of that. Here's why I pivoted.

title: Self-Diagnosed, Assuming ADHD — My Toolkit
excerpt: Pomodoro 15/3, XMind, Obsidian, hand-writing, stickies, brain dumps, and the interstitial journal. How I cope with frustration, scattered focus, and not finishing things.

title: My AI Coding Tool Journey — From Paid to Free
excerpt: ChatGPT → Windsurf (paid) → Antigravity (free/paid) → OpenCode + DeepSeek V4 Flash Free. Why I can't afford AI credits, what I use instead, and the Project Tracker app I built because I forget where I deploy things.

title: I Tried Flutter, Came Back to React Native + Expo
excerpt: Built one Android app in Flutter, never published it. Switched back to React Native + Expo for Little Wins. Dart vs JS, ecosystem size, dev experience, and why familiarity won.

title: Morning Ideas, Holding Hands
excerpt: Three ideas this morning, before breakfast. The ADHD morning flood, the capture ritual, and the ones that stick.

title: Daily Targets — July 24
excerpt: Steps done, zikr, and today's targets: 10 reels, idea validation, Little Wins App Store launch, YouTube update, and a gratitude app idea.
